steps.t: Durin asked you to use the signal horn outside Zarkul-sulûn to rally the dwarves for his assault upon the threshold of Gundabad.
Durin asked you to use the signal horn at one of the trenches to the north-west of Zarkul-sulûn to rally the dwarves for his assault upon the threshol…
Durin asked you to use the signal horn at the hidden cave of Drenghól, nearest encampment to the Mountain-home, to rally the dwarves for his assault u…
Bróin is in the hidden cave of Drenghól, nearest dwarf-encampment to Gundabad.
Bori is outside Zarkul-sulûn during the War of Three Peaks.
